data.profile_data_gaps: Outstanding mortgage balance not disclosed in submitted documents. Monthly credit card minimum payment obligations not stated. Source documentation for income not provided — employment contract or payslips not attached to the submitted application.
data.plain_profile_summary: The submitted documents describe a salaried applicant with annual gross income of 92,000 EUR from a permanent employment contract of 4 years tenure. A mortgage obligation of 1,200 EUR per month is documented with a stated property value of 280,000 EUR, though the outstanding mortgage balance is not disclosed. Credit card obligations total 3,500 EUR across two cards with a combined limit of 12,000 EUR, representing 29% utilisation. Savings of 15,000 EUR are reported. No personal loans are reported in the submitted documents. Employment tenure of 4 years with the current employer is stated; the prior employer tenure of 3 years in the same industry is also documented.
evidence_snippets: annual gross income of 92,000 EUR from a permanent contract at a mid-size technology company
Monthly mortgage payment of 1,200 EUR on a property valued at 280,000 EUR
Employment tenure of 4 years with current employer. Previous employer tenure was 3 years in the same industry.
